_comment: Intentional Mintlify navigation workarounds. Validators must not flag these patterns.

emptyAnchorSeparators.description: Sidebar visual separators. anchor: ' ' with pages: [' '] is deliberate.

redirectRoutes.description: Intentional routing workaround. These pages exist to redirect users and must not be flagged as orphans or stubs.

validatorGuidance: When checking docs.json navigation: skip any anchor whose value is a single space. When checking for orphaned or stub pages: exclude all paths listed in redirectRoutes.paths.
